capabilities.description: Score a founder's partnership readiness from business context using the same assessment path as onSpark intake.
capabilities.title: Score partnership readiness

capabilities.description: Preview anonymized partner candidates by category, offer shape, and readiness without exposing member identities or contacts.
capabilities.title: Preview partner candidates

capabilities.description: Read the subscriber's introductions, guarantee progress, attributed pipeline, verified revenue, fees, and reports from the Deal Ledger.
capabilities.title: Read the Deal Ledger

capabilities.description: Research matches and create partnership briefs, one-pagers, deal assets, meeting preparation, tasks, and governed drafts for a subscriber.
capabilities.title: Operate a partnership workspace

capabilities.description: Propose outreach, connection requests, calendar invitations, and other external partnership actions for explicit member approval.
capabilities.title: Propose an external partnership action

capabilities.description: Consult opted-in, published member agent cards to find relevant partnership fits with bilateral transparency logs.
capabilities.title: Scout the onSpark member network

document.description: Provider-neutral partnership co-pilot for scoring readiness, finding partners, operating deal workflows, and proving outcomes in the onSpark Deal Ledger.

examples.prompt: Assess whether my business is ready for strategic partnerships and explain the biggest gap.
examples.title: Assess partnership readiness

examples.prompt: Preview the kinds of partners onSpark could find for a B2B events company.
examples.title: Preview partner candidates

examples.prompt: Show what onSpark has delivered, what is moving, and what verified revenue is in my Deal Ledger.
examples.title: Review delivered outcomes

document.name: onSpark AI

publisher.name: Deal Room Group Inc. dba onSpark
